info.title: Ship Data API
info.description: API for retrieving detailed ship information including vessel details, compliance, company relationships, inspections, and more.

get.summary: Get ship data by IHS LR number or IMO number
get.description: Retrieves comprehensive ship detail data by IHS Lloyd's Register number or IMO number, including vessel specifications, compliance status, company relationships, and historical records.

parameters.name: ihslrOrImo
parameters.description: The IHS Lloyd's Register number or IMO number of the ship

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication with username and password
